description_long: This is a beige, open-top all-terrain vehicle reminiscent of a classic Land Rover Series, featuring a utilitarian design with exposed metal framework and minimalistic body panels. The vehicle has two rows of brown bench-style seats, a flat cargo bed at the rear, and a simple dashboard with a windshield frame but no glass. The sides are reinforced with metallic rails, and the wheels are large with thick, rugged tires suitable for off-road use. The front grille is wide and metallic, flanked by round headlights and small side mirrors. The overall construction emphasizes durability and practicality, making it ideal for both urban and rugged environments.
description: A beige, open-top all-terrain vehicle with exposed metal rails, brown bench seats, and rugged tires, designed for utility and durability.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the open cargo bed, rear bench seat, and metallic rails along the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the two rows of seats, open cabin, and the full length of the vehicle.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the wide metallic grille, round headlights, and windshield frame.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the open seating arrangement and side rails.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a rugged, all-terrain tread pattern with deep grooves and blocky lugs, suitable for both urban roads and off-road surfaces.
